images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a single open technical manual on a desk under a shaft of light, its pages crumbling and dissolving into drifting dust and particles at the edges — knowledge quietly decaying because no one opens it. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) pages and drifting dust motes, thin red (#eb2027) accent only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
